Imports

flush_buffer

Types

FlushState = object
  buffer*: FlushBuffer
  bufferLocks*: int
Source   Edit   
FlushWriter = object
  flush*: FlushState
Source   Edit

proc callBufferConsumer(writer: var FlushWriter) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer consumer is known not to be nil Source   Edit
